content.en:
"With the assistance of the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch, I will not lack intelligence. In the Great Universe, my foundation is still too weak!"

Ye Tian sighed.

But there is no way, the Heavenly Monarchs who can enter the Great Universe in the Void Heaven are not ordinary Heavenly Monarchs, all of them have deep backgrounds, even some weaker Heavenly Monarchs also have a big background, maybe some things will help him, but they will definitely not run errands for him.

Otherwise, he wouldn't have taken the risk of subduing the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch.

Fortunately, the benefits of subduing Yanglong Tianjun far outweigh the disadvantages, and this move is right.

In addition, he also secretly performed the Infinite Void Life Technique on Yang Long Tianjun, Yang Long Tianjun would never dare to steal and play tricks, otherwise he would easily know.

In a flash, a few days passed.

Ye Tian knew through the Infinite Void Life Technique that the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch was shuttling around on the Tai'a Sun Star, and he was not hiding somewhere to be lazy.

Moreover, he contacted Yanglong Tianjun several times, and the information said by the other party was completely correct.

Otherwise, he would definitely punish Yang Long Tianjun heavily.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian harvested more and more treasures, but the chance of finding treasures in the future was much smaller, after all, there were too many Heavenly Monarchs pouring in, and some gods would venture in to hunt for treasures, so that the treasures on Tai'a Sun Star became less and less.

"I've almost earned hundreds of thousands of points!"

Ye Tian calculated, this kind of harvest is already very good, but it is still a lot worse than killing people and stealing goods.

But once you become addicted to killing people and goods, the whole person will be completely degenerated, and even reduced to the same kind of goods as the Dark God Society.

Ye Tian has his own principles, unless he offends him, it is impossible for him to kill people and cross goods.

Ye Tian also wanted someone to kill him, but unfortunately, his popularity was very high, and other Heavenly Monarchs either couldn't beat him, or they were jealous of his identity and didn't dare to deal with him.

In short, the Heavenly Monarch he met along the way, when he saw him, they all avoided him, or said hello and left, and there was no one to assassinate him.

this day.

Ye Tian walked on a continent of the sun and stars, and suddenly received a summons from the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch.

"Master, the Eternal Flame has appeared, and some of the Heavenly Monarchs at the top of the Heavenly Monarch List are hunting down the Eternal Flame!"

Yang Long Tianjun arrived.

"The Eternal Flame has appeared!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

After inquiring about the specific situation, he quickly shuttled over.

-------------

Taia Sun Star, an area of internal airflow.

A fiery red figure is constantly shuttling, it is the elven villain transformed by the eternal flame.

Don't look at its small size, but its strength is not weak, it can incinerate a powerful Heavenly Monarch with its own flame power alone, if you divide the Heavenly Mandate Realm Peak Heavenly Monarch and the Heavenly Monarch List Heavenly Monarch into five grades, the first grade is the strongest, and the fifth grade is the weakest.

Then, this Eternal Flame definitely belongs to the third-grade Heavenly Monarch, except for the second-grade, first-grade, and Heavenly Monarch List Heavenly Monarch, other Heavenly Monarchs do not dare to approach this Eternal Flame at all.

Now.

There are more than a dozen Heavenly Monarchs who are chasing the Eternal Flame, all of them are Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List, and they are all the top three hundred Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List, and the strongest one has reached the sixth place on the Heavenly Monarch List, called the Thunder Heavenly Monarch, and he is the first Heavenly Monarch of the God of War Tower.

In addition to these dozen Heavenly Monarchs, other Heavenly Monarchs are also coming one after another, but the direction of the Eternal Flame has been changing, so there are not many Heavenly Monarchs who have arrived in time.

Originally, the strength of the Eternal Flame was far inferior to these Heavenly Monarchs, and it stands to reason that it would be difficult to escape.

However, the speed of the Eternal Flame on the Tai'a Sun Star is too fast, and it is inherently a kind of fire escape technique, and in the Tai'a Sun Star, it is simply swimming in water, and the divine consciousness of those powerful Heavenly Monarchs is severely restricted here, and some special tracking methods have also been affected, so it is difficult to hunt down the Eternal Flame.

However, the Eternal Flame has been locked, and once there are more Celestial Monarchs in pursuit, it will eventually be caught.

"Hahaha, the Eternal Flame must be my Wind Dove's!"

The seventeenth place on the Heavenly Monarch List, the Wind Dove Heavenly Monarch, arrived, and stopped in front of the escape route of the Eternal Flame.

Seeing this scene, the expression of the Thunder Heavenly Monarch behind him changed.

The top thirty Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List, the difference in strength is not so big that it cannot be resisted, such as the seventeenth and the sixth, there is indeed a certain gap, but the Heavenly Monarch who can cultivate to this level is not bad at saving his life.

The Thunder Celestial Monarch was able to defeat the Wind Dove Heavenly Monarch, but he had no hope of killing the Wind Dove Heavenly Monarch at all.

If the Eternal Flame fell into the hands of the Wind Dove Heavenly Monarch, the Thunder Heavenly Monarch would not be able to snatch it.

Rumble!

A pair of wind hands that the Wind Dove Heavenly Monarch had transformed into claws towards the Eternal Flame, but at the critical moment, a sharp arrow shot and instantly smashed the Wind Dove Heavenly Monarch's wind hand.

"Starfall Arrow-King, you dare to stop me?"

The wind dove was furious.

Wow!

A figure emerged, holding a divine bow.

He is the Starfall Arrow Monarch ranked 21st on the Heavenly Monarch List, his archery skills are the most chaotic, one arrow can penetrate hundreds of millions of worlds, he can cross infinite territories, shoot enemies, and he is one of the Heavenly Monarchs with the widest range of attacks, and he is also the Heavenly Monarch that everyone fears.

Once, the Starfall Arrow Monarch shot a weak True Monarch in the chaos, across a starry sky continent.

If it were other Heavenly Monarchs, even the invincible Heavenly Monarch who was the first on the Heavenly Monarch List, he would never be able to do such an amazing means.

Of course, Starfall Arrow King also has a flaw, that is, the melee combat method is average.

But melee combat is average, and relatively speaking, no one at the Heavenly Monarch level can kill him, and if he can't beat him, he can escape, and then shoot at you from a long distance, which is very annoying.

Therefore, the other Heavenly Monarchs are unwilling to offend the Starfall Arrow King, otherwise once they are offended, they must be cautious when walking outside in the future, and be wary of the Starfall Arrow King's divine arrows, and they are in a state of mental tension all the time, which is definitely an extremely desperate state.

"Thunder Heavenly Monarch, the Eternal Flame is an ownerless thing, I can naturally stop you!"

Starfall Arrow Monarch said coldly.

"You ......"

The Thunder Heavenly Monarch's eyes widened angrily, but he didn't dare to attack the Starfall Arrow Monarch.

Immediately, he went on to capture the Eternal Flame, and the Starfall Arrow King joined the fray.

Everyone has their own ability!

One by one, powerful Heavenly Monarchs joined, and some Heavenly Monarchs who were in weaker strength did not dare to participate and withdrew one after another, otherwise once they were killed by Thunder Heavenly Monarchs and other Heavenly Monarchs, it would be completely finished.

Soon.

The Eternal Flame was completely besieged in an area, and even the Fire Escape Technique was useless, and there was no way to escape anymore.

At that moment, a voice resounded through the void.

"The Eternal Flame is mine!"

Hearing this voice, the Heavenly Monarchs stopped.

Many Heavenly Monarchs recognized the owner of this voice, and it was the first Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List - Zero!

Zero is the name of the Heavenly Monarch who is the first on the Heavenly Monarch list, the other party does not use the title of Heavenly Monarch, someone once wanted to give this Heavenly Monarch a name, but he refused.

Zero said that its name is zero, and its title is also zero, and others are not allowed to change it.

Zero is not a person from the major forces, but a casual cultivator, and it took some price to be able to enter the great universe this time.

Moreover, Zero wears a mask, and no one knows what his face is.

But everybody is afraid of Zero!

He was one of the oldest Heavenly Monarchs of Chaos, having lived far too long, even longer than many True Ancestors.

In the chaos, no one ranks the Heavenly Monarch, because the chaos is too big, there are too many Heavenly Monarchs, and many Heavenly Monarchs have not fought each other and cannot give a ranking, but Zero definitely belongs to one of the strongest Heavenly Monarchs.

And in the big universe, Zero's strength far surpasses that of others.

No one fought against Zero, and they didn't know if they would be able to survive under Zero, but they didn't dare to try.

No one knows what Zero's strength is, but it is a little clear, that is, Zero has mastered the Chaos Divine Power at the extreme level, and there is far more than one.

In addition, Zero Avenue has traveled at least tens of thousands of meters.

"Zero, if you want to compete for the Eternal Flame, I'm willing to give up!"

Starfall Arrow King was the first to withdraw.

The Thunder Heavenly Monarch and the Wind Dove Heavenly Monarch also chose to withdraw one by one.

They know that they can't compete with Zero, and they might as well quit, otherwise they will anger Zero and it will be over.

Zero is not only powerful, but also a madman, and is not afraid of the identity behind them.

Maybe in the chaos, he was still a little afraid and didn't dare to kill him, but in the great universe, if Ling Zhen made a move, Dao Ancestor couldn't stop it.

Zero appeared, wearing a mask and grabbing the Eternal Flame with one hand.

Eternal Flame was so frightened that he found that his body was constantly flying towards Zero, and he couldn't break free at all.

This is one of the Chaos Powers - Void Capture!

It is not a powerful Chaos Divine Power, and it can't even rank three thousand Chaos Divine Powers, but it has been cultivated to the limit level by Zero, so its power is also very terrifying.

Just when everyone thought that the Eternal Flame would fall into Zero's hands, a figure appeared, grabbed the Eternal Flame, and shuttled away.

This scene was so fast that even Zero was stunned.

Just when Zero was furious, he found that he had lost his trace.

"It's the Great Realm Shift!"

A heavenly monarch recognized it and said.

"Could it be that he is a Heavenly Monarch of the Dark God Society, and it is said that the Dark God Society has the Great Realm Shift Inheritance!" said Youtian Monarch.

However, what they never expected was that the person who made the shot was Ye Tian, the son of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao.

It's just that Ye Tian used that soul-like Chaos Arcana Hundred Transformation Mirror to change his soul aura, and then changed his appearance, affecting his own life aura, so these people couldn't recognize it.

Of course, if Ye Tian stayed for too long, these people might use some special means to recognize him.

But Ye Tian came too fast and walked too fast, which was beyond their expectations, how could anyone have time to spy on Ye Tian's true face.

......

Somewhere in the big universe, in a small world.

Ye Tian's figure appeared, and there was still a little panic on his face.

"It's so dangerous, so many Heavenly Monarchs, fortunately, the plan went well, otherwise once you are trapped, as soon as your supernatural powers are used, I am afraid that the supernatural powers will inevitably be exposed. The threat of the other Heavenly Monarchs is nothing, but that Zero is too terrifying!"

Ye Tian was not afraid of any Heavenly Monarch before, but he met that Zero just now, even if he hadn't seen him really make a move, but he used the copying talent to probe the other party's talent, but found that the other party had a lot of super god-level talents, as well as the talents after fusion.

Obviously, this person has cultivated a lot of Chaos Divine Powers, plus the other party is very old and has cultivated for countless years, many Chaos Divine Powers may have been cultivated to the extreme level.

A variety of chaotic supernatural power limit levels, the physical body is tempered to the limit, and the soul is afraid that it is also tempered to the limit, how terrifying is such a strength.

Ye Tian even felt that he had escaped slowly, afraid that he would be severely injured by the other party.

Fortunately, the Eternal Flame is in hand, once the Eternal Fire Extinguishing is completed, and the foundation is accumulated, Ye Tian is definitely not afraid of zero, and even can easily surpass zero in the future.
